div.head: The Greek Chargé (Tsamados) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Mr. Secretary of State: In reply to the note you were pleased to send to this Legation on May 18, 1920, relative to the conclusion of a treaty intended to amend Article XVII of the Treaty of Navigation and Commerce concluded between Greece and the United States of America of December 22, 1837, I have the honor to inform Your Excellency that the Royal Government is disposed to sign a convention in the form of a draft submitted in the aforesaid note of the Department of State.
In so informing me, the Royal Government forwarded to me the full powers needed to proceed without delay with the conclusion of that treaty.
